text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I talked to my family yesterday, and they
shared their happy qi with me!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
My dad and I talked a bunch about feng shui, and
my mom seemed as happy as ever!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
And my little brother... Well, he still didn't seem
very interested in feng shui, but he sounded fine,
so that was nice!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
My two youngest sisters were acting like royalty,
giving my middle sister a headache with all their
demands for stuff...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It sounds like Copano Rickey had a great time on
her day off!
